rationale: Review 1's only genuine finding (map_proj deserves @[simp]) is minor, and its other two suggestions are either debatable (making fiberHomeomorph private against the stated roadmap) or based on a misreading (applySubgroupContinuousConstSMul is a general-purpose utility, not Deck-only). Review 2 correctly approves a sound API; the marginal gain from the one real simp finding does not clearly outweigh the noise the author would also act on.
